blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,197 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 23.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
